Itinerary_Version.conversation_history: give me 10 days travel plan in Japan

Itinerary.title: 10-Day Japan Essentials: Tokyo to Miyajima
Itinerary.summary: A 10-day route combining major cities, cultural experiences, natural scenery, and efficient travel connections for first-time or return visitors to Japan.

Activity.name: Arrive at Narita/Haneda, transfer to hotel
Activity.description: Clear immigration, take airport transfer to central Tokyo, check in or store luggage.

Activity.name: Shinjuku stroll & observation
Activity.description: Explore Shinjuku station area, visit Metropolitan Government Building for free city views and have dinner nearby.

Accommodation.name: Tokyo hotel (Shinjuku or Shibuya area)
Accommodation.notes: Choose convenient station access for subsequent travel.

Day.focus: Classic Tokyo neighborhoods and cultural sites

Activity.name: Asakusa & Senso-ji
Activity.description: Visit Senso-ji temple, stroll Nakamise shopping street for snacks and souvenirs.

Activity.name: Ueno Park & Museums or Ameya-Yokocho Market
Activity.description: Choose a museum (Tokyo National Museum) or explore market stalls and casual eats.

Activity.name: Akihabara or Ginza depending on interest
Activity.description: Electronics and anime culture in Akihabara or upscale shopping and dining in Ginza.

Day.focus: Onsen, views of Mt. Fuji, and scenic transport

Activity.name: Travel to Hakone via Odawara/Shinkansen + local transport
Activity.description: Take bullet train to Odawara, then Hakone Tozan Railway/cable car and sightseeing loop.

Activity.name: Hakone Sightseeing: Open-Air Museum and Lake Ashi
Activity.description: Visit Hakone Open-Air Museum and take a boat on Lake Ashi for views of Mt. Fuji (weather permitting).

Accommodation.name: Ryokan or onsen hotel in Hakone (optional overnight)
Accommodation.notes: Enjoy onsen and kaiseki dinner if staying overnight.

Day.focus: Transit day with evening Kyoto introduction

Activity.name: Shinkansen to Kyoto
Activity.description: Board bullet train from Odawara or Tokyo to Kyoto; check into accommodation and rest.

Activity.name: Gion evening walk and Yasaka Shrine
Activity.description: Stroll historic Gion district, glimpse traditional streets and Yasaka Shrine illuminated at night.

Accommodation.name: Kyoto machiya or hotel near Kawaramachi
Accommodation.notes: Central location for walking to major sites.

Activity.name: Fushimi Inari Taisha early visit
Activity.description: Beat crowds for the torii gate trail at Fushimi Inari.

Activity.name: Kiyomizu-dera and Higashiyama district
Activity.description: Explore the temple and charming historic streets leading to shops and tea houses.

Activity.name: Arashiyama bamboo grove and Tenryu-ji
Activity.description: Visit the bamboo grove, riverside area, and Tenryu-ji temple; consider boat or stroll.

Day.date_note: Day trip to Nara or more Kyoto
Day.focus: Deer park and Todai-ji or deeper Kyoto neighborhoods

Activity.name: Nara: Todai-ji and Nara Park
Activity.description: Meet free-roaming deer, visit the Great Buddha at Todai-ji, and stroll the park.

Activity.name: Return to Kyoto: Philosopher's Path or tea district
Activity.description: Walk the Philosopher's Path or visit smaller temples and cafes in the area.

Accommodation.name: Kyoto hotel
Accommodation.notes: Prepare for transfer to Osaka tomorrow.

Day.focus: City food culture and evening nightlife

Activity.name: Short train to Osaka, check into hotel
Activity.description: Move to Osaka and settle in near Namba or Umeda for best dining options.

Activity.name: Dotonbori and Kuromon Market food crawl
Activity.description: Taste takoyaki, okonomiyaki, and market specialties; enjoy neon-lit canal area at night.

Accommodation.name: Osaka hotel (Namba/Umeda)
Accommodation.notes: Stay central for next day's travel or Osaka castle visit.

Activity.name: Osaka Castle and park visit
Activity.description: Tour the historic castle and its museum, then walk the surrounding park.

Activity.name: Afternoon options: Universal Studios Japan or shopping in Umeda
Activity.description: Choose theme park fun or department store and underground shopping exploration.

Accommodation.name: Osaka hotel
Accommodation.notes: Prepare for early transfer to Hiroshima tomorrow.

Day.focus: Peace Memorial Park and Itsukushima Shrine

Activity.name: Shinkansen to Hiroshima, visit Peace Memorial Park & Museum
Activity.description: Spend time at the museum and memorial for reflection and history.

Activity.name: Ferry to Miyajima and Itsukushima Shrine
Activity.description: See the floating torii gate at low or high tide and stroll the island; try local oysters.

Accommodation.name: Hiroshima or Miyajima ryokan/hotel
Accommodation.notes: Overnight on island for sunset/sunrise views if desired.

Day.date_note: Return to Tokyo or depart from Kansai/Osaka

Activity.name: Return travel: Shinkansen to Tokyo or transfer to Kansai Intl
Activity.description: Allow ample time for transfers; consider direct shinkansen back to Tokyo or train/airport transfer for international flight.

Activity.name: Last-minute city time depending on flight schedule
Activity.description: If time permits, enjoy a final meal or short walk in departure city before heading to airport.

Accommodation.name: Departure night or airport hotel (if needed)
Accommodation.notes: Stay near airport if early flight; otherwise final night in Tokyo/Osaka.
